summary: Complete testing of Geist TTRPG app conversion from AI storyteller to character sheet with dice roller - All requested features working correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Nested button elements causing hydration warnings in console

integration_issues.issue: Emergent badge overlay intercepts clicks on dice roller button

passed_tests: All three main tabs (Character, Cards, Campaign) visible and functional
AI chat interface successfully removed - no message inputs or chat elements
Character tab shows complete character sheet with all sections
Cards tab displays Conditions, Haunts, Keys, and Ceremonies sections
Campaign tab shows campaign details or 'No Campaign Selected' message
Dice Roller floating button opens/closes properly
Dice rolling functionality works with visual results
Sidebar shows New Session and New Campaign options
Sessions and campaigns can be created/selected from sidebar
Backend APIs all functional (17/17 tests passed)

success_percentage.backend: 100% - 17/17 tests passed including all CRUD and dice functionality
success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major features working, minor overlay click issue with workaround
